manager_rows.benchmark_basis_description: Uses the existing manager-specific synthetic mandate proxy as the manager comparison benchmark, while separately storing the selected AI Adoption theme-benchmark blend needed for future calculated effects.
caveats: Manager effect is limited to capital the manager controlled.
